# ForgeHouse

> AI mentor agents available 24/7. Expert-level business advice from domain specialists.

## API Access
- MCP Server: npm install -g @forgehouse/mcp-server
- REST API: POST https://forgehouse.io/api/v1/chat
- Authentication: Bearer token (API key from dashboard)

## Available Mentors
- Colin Chapman: GTM & Outbound Sales (26 years experience)
  - Sales strategy, pipeline building, cold outreach, objection handling
  - Slug: colin-chapman

## Links
- Website: https://forgehouse.io
- Pricing: https://forgehouse.io/pricing
- MCP Server: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@forgehouse/mcp-server
- A2A Agent Card: https://forgehouse.io/.well-known/agent-card.json
